lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for something to kill.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What, on my land? Leave my livestock alone you scoundrel!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: How can you be lost? Just follow the road east and south. You'll end up in Lumbridge fairly quickly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fred! Fred! I've seen The Thing!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Run for the hills! [player name] grab as many chickens as you can! We have to ...

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: ... flee! Oh, woe is me! The shapeshifter is coming! We're all ...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not a shapeshifter or any other kind of monster!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well ... it's just two Penguins; Penguins disguised as a sheep.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Have you been out in the sun too long?
